title: ADJ Music
description: Music for the modpack 'A Distant Journey'
body: Music for my modpack A Distant Journey. What it includes: * Backported music from the 1.21 and 1.21.6 updates. * Some tracks from Minecraft: Dungeons. * Some tracks from Legacy Console minigames. * Some of the missing C418 tracks * Fan-made MC music I found randomly on Youtube, which was shared with permission to use or under free-to-use term. Featured artists: [Soul\_](https://www.youtube.com/@soulwynmc), [Steelman.](https://www.youtube.com/@steelmanmusic) You can find the full playlist with all of the new tracks (here read: without backported music) HERE. If you are a creator of one of the fan tracks included and would like me to either remove your music from the pack or make you more 'visible' in credits, please let me know (preferably __through either Discord or CF mail__) and I’ll make adjustments immediately. Odds are none of you are going to see it, but if you do - I love your work!   **ALL CREDITS GO TO ORIGINAL CREATORS OF THE TRACKS. I own nothing in this pack! This is a **fan-made, non-commercial project** created purely to be included in my modpack!**
